title: Gallagher Report Reveals That U.S. Employers Are Offering Flexible Benefits to Capture the Interest of a Diverse Workforce
text: Versatile medical and voluntary benefits, in addition to compensation, are helping employers retain and attract talent ROLLING MEADOWS, Ill. , Aug. 2, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- With nearly half of the 4,000+ U.S. employers surveyed experiencing turnover of 15% or more in 2021, retention and attraction are top priorities — and the tool employers are using to address this issue: flexible total rewards.
